creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Cf. http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/data/112amd64-default-PR231590/2018-10-29_06h48m05s/logs/errors/xtensa-esp32-elf-1.22.0.g20171219_2.log

[INFO ]  Installing pass-2 core C gcc compiler
[ERROR]    /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/xtensa-esp32-elf/work/crosstool-NG-1.22.0-80-g6c4433a5/.build/src/gcc-5.2.0/gcc/wide-int.h:370:10: error: too many template-parameter-lists
[ERROR]    /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/xtensa-esp32-elf/work/crosstool-NG-1.22.0-80-g6c4433a5/.build/src/gcc-5.2.0/gcc/wide-int.h:377:10: error: too many template-parameter-lists
[ERROR]    /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/xtensa-esp32-elf/work/crosstool-NG-1.22.0-80-g6c4433a5/.build/src/gcc-5.2.0/gcc/wide-int.h:384:10: error: too many template-parameter-lists


This also is based on a major version of GCC long out of maintenance
(GCC 5, and even GCC 6 isn't maintained any more), so perhaps best
simply deprecate and remove the port?
